topics.title: Reaction to Sirius Premiere and Pete Townsend Controversy
topics.summary: The studio discusses positive listener feedback regarding the transition to satellite radio, the recent roast of Gary Bababooie, and a news report concerning Pete Townsend's walk-off during an interview.

topics.title: Domain Names and Radio Censorship
topics.summary: The studio discusses the value of controversial domain names, the decline of traditional radio due to commercial interruptions, and experiences with international broadcasting restrictions.

topics.title: Comedy Roast Fallout
topics.summary: The studio explores the aftermath of a roast segment where personal jokes about Beth and her appearance caused tension between Howard and his colleagues.

topics.title: Comedy Roast Planning
topics.summary: The studio discusses the fallout from a recent roast involving personal jokes about family members and plans for future comedy events featuring guests like Andrew Dice Clay or George Takei.

topics.title: Uncut Comedy Roast Format
topics.summary: The studio discusses the benefits of an uncut roast format compared to edited television and recounts a guest's experience being cut off from the air in Pittsburgh.

topics.title: Censorship and Political Commentary
topics.summary: The studio explores a comedian's experience being censored for jokes about the presidency and discusses cultural figures like Whoopi Goldberg, Madonna, and the Dixie Chicks.

topics.title: Richard Pryor and Comedy Industry Anecdotes
topics.summary: The studio features a discussion of Richard Pryor’s personal life, his professional relationships with figures like Eddie Murphy and Chucklehut, and various stories from the comedy circuit involving drug use and celebrity encounters.

topics.title: Paul Mooney Comedy Tour
topics.summary: The studio features Paul Mooney discussing his upcoming comedy tour dates, the nature of fame and wealth, and various pop culture topics with callers.

topics.title: Rolling Stones Tickets and Porn Star Interview
topics.summary: The studio features a discussion regarding the acquisition of Rolling Stones concert tickets through a series of challenges followed by an interview with adult film actress Justine Jolie.

topics.title: Justine Jolie Interview
topics.summary: The studio features an interview with adult film star Justine Jolie, who discusses her career, personal life, and performs a live demonstration for the show.

topics.title: Radio Show Segments and Guest Interviews
topics.summary: The show features a series of segments including a discussion on alien lore, a segment regarding celebrity news and upcoming roasts, and an interview with a guest about his personal relationships.

topics.title: Rolling Stones Dynamics and Roast Feedback
topics.summary: The studio discusses the interpersonal dynamics of Mick Jagger and Keith Richards during the recording of Exile on Main Street while reviewing listener feedback regarding a recent comedy roast.

topics.title: Celebrity News and Medical Research
topics.summary: The studio discusses various topics including celebrity news regarding Kevin Federline, Michael J. Fox, and Dick Clark, while also touching on stem cell research and a report on declining testosterone levels in men.

topics.title: Celebrity News and Legal Disputes
topics.summary: The show covers allegations against Naomi Campbell, details regarding Paul McCartney’s divorce proceedings, and Madonna’s adoption of a child from Malawi.

topics.title: Public Health, Celebrity News, and Sports Updates
topics.summary: The studio discusses the use of hand sanitizer by politicians, celebrity health rumors involving Nicole Richie, a new radio hire, copyright issues with YouTube content, military news regarding waterboarding, a California wildfire, and various sports and entertainment updates.
